Package registry.render

Class FloatingLayerRegistry

java.lang.Object
registry.render.FloatingLayerRegistry
public final class FloatingLayerRegistry extends Object
A registry for managing different rendering layers and their associated JavaFX Panes. It also tracks which layers are considered "floating" (e.g., UI overlays or animations).

  • Method Details

    • markFloating

      public void markFloating(RenderLayer layer)
      Marks a layer as being a floating layer.
      Parameters:
      layer - The RenderLayer to mark.

    • isFloating

      public boolean isFloating(RenderLayer layer)
      Checks if a layer is marked as floating.
      Parameters:
      layer - The RenderLayer to check.
      Returns:
      true if the layer is floating, false otherwise.

    • registerEntry

      public void registerEntry(RenderLayer layer, javafx.scene.layout.Pane pane)
      Registers a JavaFX Pane for a specific render layer.
      Parameters:
      layer - The RenderLayer.
      pane - The Pane to associate with the layer.

    • getPane

      public javafx.scene.layout.Pane getPane(RenderLayer layer)
      Retrieves the JavaFX Pane associated with a render layer.
      Parameters:
      layer - The RenderLayer.
      Returns:
      The associated Pane, or null if not registered.
